events.summary: Combined Full Staff & Monthly Leadership meeting

prep.summary: You are coordinating several high-stakes, overlapping initiatives—notably the Scan AI capability alignment against Celonis and the impending Project IVA Board presentation. Your immediate focus must center on resolving the funding friction between Corporate and P&C business units—an issue complicating the Scan AI procurement timeline—while preparing Tech Fellows to cascade the filtered engineering feedback. You must also track the governance of developer productivity tools—including Project Genie—and ensure alignment before Deepak's upcoming dialogue session.
tasks: Synthesize the key takeaways from the Monday and Thursday HP sessions—focusing specifically on the filtered list of ten engineering feedback items—to align with Deepak's upcoming dialogue.
Resolve the funding impasse and capability overlap between Scan AI and Celonis—clarifying whether the Contact Center and P&C divisions will submit a unified business case.
Finalize the status of the Project IVA rollout—reviewing the timeline for the Thursday employee pilot and the upcoming Board presentation.
Establish clear governance parameters for developer productivity tools—specifically positioning Project Genie within the GenAI Council queue to secure leadership alignment.
prep.title: Combined Full Staff & Monthly Leadership meeting

focus_html:
Focus · Next up
9:00 AM — 10:00 AM

Combined Full Staff & Monthly Leadership meeting

https://usaa.zoom.us/j/9683...
Prep

You are coordinating several high-stakes, overlapping initiatives—notably the Scan AI capability alignment against Celonis and the impending Project IVA Board presentation. Your immediate focus must center on resolving the funding friction between Corporate and P&C business units—an issue complicating the Scan AI procurement timeline—while preparing Tech Fellows to cascade the filtered engineering feedback. You must also track the governance of developer productivity tools—including Project Genie—and ensure alignment before Deepak's upcoming dialogue session.

  • Synthesize the key takeaways from the Monday and Thursday HP sessions—focusing specifically on the filtered list of ten engineering feedback items—to align with Deepak's upcoming dialogue.
  • Resolve the funding impasse and capability overlap between Scan AI and Celonis—clarifying whether the Contact Center and P&C divisions will submit a unified business case.
  • Finalize the status of the Project IVA rollout—reviewing the timeline for the Thursday employee pilot and the upcoming Board presentation.
  • Establish clear governance parameters for developer productivity tools—specifically positioning Project Genie within the GenAI Council queue to secure leadership alignment.
